OVERVIEW: Start a virtual machine or resume a suspended virtual machine.

USAGE: utmctl start [--debug] [--hide] <identifier> [--attach] [--disposable] [--recovery]

ARGUMENTS:
  <identifier>            Either the UUID or the complete name of the virtual
                          machine.

OPTIONS:
  -d, --debug             Show debug logging.
  --hide                  Hide the main UTM window.
  -a, --attach            Attach to the first serial port after start.
  --disposable            Run VM as a snapshot and do not save changes to disk.
  --recovery              Boot a VM in recovery mode.
  -h, --help              Show help information.
